title: Jansenella griffithiana
taxonomy: Jansenella griffithiana is classified in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Apostasioideae. Jansenella griffithiana is also a member of the tribe Apostasieae. This orchid is native to the Western Ghats in India. Its classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
